name: @cleepi/toolkit
description_en: The Cleevio agent in one install. Bundles @cleepi/sdd, base, coding, git, crew, atlassian, and ships a `cleepi-toolkit init` CLI to wire them up in one command.
description_zh: 一站式 Cleevio 代理安装。捆绑 @cleepi/sdd、base、coding、git、crew、atlassian，并提供 `cleepi-toolkit init` CLI 以一键连接它们
